task: Create a daily operations report: check disk usage, list running services (processes), check the last 5 git commits, and write a combined summary report to /tmp/clive/result.txt with sections for each area.

Build a dashboard: fetch weather from Open-Meteo for Munich, get GitHub trending repos (from API), and check public IP address. Compile all data into a formatted text dashboard at /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Set up a new Python project at /tmp/clive/new_app/: create directory structure (src, tests, docs), initialize git repo, create pyproject.toml with project metadata, write a hello world main.py, create a test file, and generate a README. Write the tree structure to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Build and run a data pipeline: download posts from JSONPlaceholder API, transform to CSV, filter by userId=1, compute statistics (count, average title length), and write a markdown report to /tmp/clive/result.md.

Run a security audit on the local system: check for world-writable files in /tmp/clive, list open network ports, verify SSH key permissions, check for known vulnerable packages (check versions). Write a security report to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Complete invoice workflow: parse the invoice at /tmp/clive/invoice.txt, validate the amounts, calculate VAT at 19%, create a payment record, and generate an email draft to kiu@ikangai.com confirming the payment. Save all outputs under /tmp/clive/.

initial_state.setup:
cat > /tmp/clive/invoice.txt << 'INV'
INVOICE #INV-2026-099
From: CloudServe GmbH
To: ikangai UG

Consulting Services: €5,000.00
Cloud Infrastructure: €2,500.00
Subtotal: €7,500.00
VAT (19%): €1,425.00
Total: €8,925.00
INV

task: Review Python code at /tmp/clive/code.py: check for syntax errors, run a linter (pylint or flake8 if available, else manual check), identify potential bugs, and write a code review document to /tmp/clive/result.txt with issues found and suggestions.

initial_state.setup:
cat > /tmp/clive/code.py << 'PY'
import os
import sys

def process_data(data):
    result = []
    for item in data:
        if item['status'] == 'active':
            result.append(item['value'] / item['count'])
    return result

def read_file(path):
    f = open(path)
    content = f.read()
    return content

def parse_config(text):
    config = eval(text)
    return config
PY

task: Investigate an incident from /tmp/clive/app.log: find all ERROR entries, identify the root cause (the first ERROR), determine the impact (how many subsequent errors), and write an incident report to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: echo '2026-04-09T10:00:00 INFO Server started on port 8080' > /tmp/clive/app.log && echo '2026-04-09T10:01:00 INFO Request processed: GET /api/users' >> /tmp/clive/app.log && echo '2026-04-09T10:02:00 ERROR Database connection pool exhausted' >> /tmp/clive/app.log && echo '2026-04-09T10:02:01 ERROR Failed to process request: no available connections' >> /tmp/clive/app.log && echo '2026-04-09T10:02:02 ERROR Request timeout on /api/users' >> /tmp/clive/app.log && echo '2026-04-09T10:02:03 WARN Connection attempt 1 of 3' >> /tmp/clive/app.log && echo '2026-04-09T10:02:05 ERROR Connection retry failed' >> /tmp/clive/app.log && echo '2026-04-09T10:03:00 INFO Database connection restored' >> /tmp/clive/app.log && echo '2026-04-09T10:03:01 INFO Normal operations resumed' >> /tmp/clive/app.log

task: Perform competitive analysis: fetch GitHub repo stats for tmux/tmux and screen (GNU Screen), compare star counts, recent commit activity, and open issues. Compile a comparison table and recommendation into /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Migrate environment configuration: read config from /tmp/clive/old_config.ini (INI format), validate all values, convert to TOML format at /tmp/clive/new_config.toml, generate a migration report documenting what changed. Write report to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
